title: Waniwani project configuration
description: Project-level configuration for Waniwani MCP projects. Consumed by @waniwani/sdk at runtime and by @waniwani/cli for local dev, evals, and knowledge-base tooling.

$schema.description: URL of the JSON Schema for editor autocomplete. Ignored at runtime.

orgId.description: Waniwani organization ID this project belongs to. Written by `waniwani connect`.

projectId.description: Waniwani MCP project ID. Written by `waniwani connect`.

apiUrl.description: Base URL of the Waniwani API. Defaults to https://app.waniwani.ai.

devPort.description: Local port the MCP listens on during `waniwani dev`. Overridden by the `--port` flag. Defaults to 3000.
